name: Moonmon

signature_move.name: Baby Bubble
signature_move.description: Spews cold bubbles that glow a bluish-white

description: A Baby Digimon with an appearance resembling a falling droplet. Only appearing on bright moonlit nights, there are records of it being sighted near Pokomon , which has a similar habit. A characteristic antenna-like protuberance grows from its head, and swings energetically whenever it is in a good mood. Its Special Move is spewing cold bubbles that glow a bluish-white ( Moonlight Bubble ).
